entries.source: Public pages, topic chats, learning paths, blog guides, and help pages are designed to be easy to find and share.
entries.value: Halaman awam, sembang topik, laluan pembelajaran, panduan blog, dan halaman bantuan direka supaya mudah ditemui dan dikongsi.

entries.source: Start learning
entries.value: Mula belajar

entries.source: Public learning pages are open, while API routes, admin routes, reset flows, and private utility pages remain blocked.
entries.value: Halaman pembelajaran awam terbuka, sementara laluan API, laluan pentadbir, aliran tetapan semula, dan halaman utiliti peribadi kekal disekat.

entries.source: Each learning mode has a public link so learners can start directly inside the right learning experience.
entries.value: Setiap mod pembelajaran mempunyai pautan awam supaya pelajar boleh bermula terus dalam pengalaman pembelajaran yang betul.

entries.source: Use this when referencing public/private boundaries, learner safety, and school trust.
entries.value: Gunakan ini apabila merujuk sempadan awam/peribadi, keselamatan pelajar, dan kepercayaan sekolah.

entries.source: AI content index
entries.value: Indeks kandungan AI

entries.source: Unlike a generic chatbot, inspir organizes AI around learning modes so learners can start with the kind of help they need: hints, questions, quizzes, active recall, roleplay, debate, or feedback.
entries.value: Tidak seperti chatbot generik, inspir menyusun AI sekitar mod pembelajaran supaya pelajar boleh bermula dengan jenis bantuan yang mereka perlukan: petunjuk, soalan, kuiz, ingatan semula aktif, lakonan peranan, debat, atau maklum balas.

entries.source: School deployments can be adapted around custom content, workflows, prompts, and NCERT-aligned learning needs where appropriate.
entries.value: Pelaksanaan sekolah boleh disesuaikan sekitar kandungan tersuai, aliran kerja, gesaan, dan keperluan pembelajaran sejajar NCERT apabila sesuai.

entries.source: Learning behavior comes first
entries.value: Tingkah laku pembelajaran didahulukan

entries.source: Public guest modes give anyone a useful place to start, while school and partner deployments can adapt the experience for local needs.
entries.value: Mod tetamu awam memberi sesiapa sahaja tempat yang berguna untuk bermula, sementara pelaksanaan sekolah dan rakan kongsi boleh menyesuaikan pengalaman untuk keperluan setempat.

entries.source: Every core learning mode has a public guest entrypoint so people can start from search, social, or a shared link.
entries.value: Setiap mod pembelajaran teras mempunyai titik masuk tetamu awam supaya orang boleh bermula daripada carian, sosial, atau pautan kongsi.

entries.source: Can a rollout start small?
entries.value: Bolehkah pelaksanaan bermula secara kecil-kecilan?

entries.source: A clear explanation of guest mode, private chats, learner safety, and school trust.
entries.value: Bahagian depan yang jelas yang menanyakan satu idea.

entries.source: The public statement of why inspir exists and what learning access means.
entries.value: Pernyataan awam tentang sebab inspir wujud dan maksud akses pembelajaran.

entries.source: 1M+ learners
entries.value: 1 juta+ pelajar

entries.source: The goal is not to make people passive in front of AI. The goal is to give every learner a patient first place to ask, practise, get feedback, try again, and build confidence.
entries.value: Matlamatnya bukan untuk menjadikan orang pasif di hadapan AI. Matlamatnya ialah memberi setiap pelajar tempat pertama yang sabar untuk bertanya, berlatih, mendapatkan maklum balas, mencuba lagi, dan membina keyakinan.

entries.source: The public product, the school pathway, and the content library should all point back to the same principle: learning should stay active, accessible, and useful.
entries.value: Produk awam, laluan sekolah, dan perpustakaan kandungan semuanya harus menunjuk kembali kepada prinsip yang sama: pembelajaran harus kekal aktif, mudah diakses, dan berguna.

entries.value: 1 juta+ pelajar

entries.source: Quality learning should feel available, human, and alive.
entries.value: Pembelajaran berkualiti patut terasa tersedia, manusiawi, dan hidup.

entries.source: inspir is organized around learning modes such as Socratic tutoring, homework hints, quizzes, flashcards, maths steps, writing critique, and exam planning, so students land in a more focused learning behavior.
entries.value: inspir disusun sekitar mod pembelajaran seperti bimbingan Socratic, petunjuk kerja rumah, kuiz, kad imbas, langkah matematik, kritikan penulisan, dan perancangan peperiksaan, supaya pelajar mendarat dalam tingkah laku pembelajaran yang lebih berfokus.

entries.source: The mission is connected to real product surfaces.
entries.value: Misi ini dihubungkan kepada permukaan produk sebenar.

entries.source: inspir makes learning modes open at /chat/{topicSlug}, letting learners land directly inside the right AI learning experience without needing a saved private chat.
entries.value: inspir menjadikan mod pembelajaran terbuka di /chat/{topicSlug}, membolehkan pelajar mendarat terus dalam pengalaman pembelajaran AI yang betul tanpa memerlukan sembang peribadi tersimpan.

entries.source: The public product stays easy to try: learners can land directly on a learning mode and begin as a guest. Schools and CSR partners can support tailored deployments when communities need confidentiality, curriculum alignment, or subsidised access.
entries.value: Produk awam kekal mudah dicuba: pelajar boleh tiba terus pada mod pembelajaran dan bermula sebagai tetamu. Sekolah dan rakan CSR boleh menyokong pelaksanaan yang disesuaikan apabila komuniti memerlukan kerahsiaan, penjajaran kurikulum, atau akses bersubsidi.

entries.value: Kisah ini merangkumi kuiz, rangkaian sekolah luar talian, penyerapan kurikulum, dan mod pembelajaran AI awam.

entries.source: inspir is a free AI learning platform with public guest modes for explanations, Socratic tutoring, homework coaching, quizzes, flashcards, debate, roleplay, writing feedback, and study planning.
entries.value: inspir ialah platform pembelajaran AI percuma dengan mod tetamu awam untuk penerangan, bimbingan Socratic, bimbingan kerja rumah, kuiz, kad imbas, debat, main peranan, maklum balas penulisan, dan perancangan belajar.

entries.source: From Facebook quizzes and offline events to applied AI learning infrastructure.
entries.value: Daripada kuiz Facebook dan acara luar talian kepada infrastruktur pembelajaran AI terapan.

entries.source: The strongest angle is free public AI learning that opens directly in guest mode and keeps learners active through mode-specific teaching rather than generic answer generation.
entries.value: Sudut paling kuat ialah pembelajaran AI awam percuma yang terbuka terus dalam mod tetamu dan memastikan pelajar kekal aktif melalui pengajaran khusus mengikut mod, bukan penjanaan jawapan generik.

entries.value: Perpustakaan pembelajaran bertulis yang menyokong gesaan, gelung belajar, dan latihan yang lebih mendalam.

entries.source: inspir is organized around hints, questions, quizzes, flashcards, debate, review, and explanation instead of passive answer-copying.
entries.value: inspir disusun sekitar petunjuk, soalan, kuiz, kad imbas, debat, ulang kaji, dan penerangan dan bukannya penyalinan jawapan secara pasif.

entries.source: Default guest tutor

entries.source: What is the most useful product angle for coverage?
entries.value: Apakah sudut produk paling berguna untuk liputan?

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different interaction shapes, so inspir uses active, mode-specific teaching. A homework hint, Socratic question, historical simulation, flashcard review, and writing critique should not behave like the same generic chat.
entries.value: Tugasan pembelajaran yang berbeza memerlukan bentuk interaksi yang berbeza, jadi inspir menggunakan pengajaran aktif yang khusus mengikut mod. Petunjuk kerja rumah, soalan Socratic, simulasi sejarah, ulang kaji kad imbas, dan kritikan penulisan tidak patut berkelakuan seperti sembang umum yang sama.

entries.source: Mission | inspir
entries.value: Misi | inspir

entries.source: Schools can test public guest modes first, then use the schools page to explore tailored workflows, confidentiality planning, NCERT-aligned options, and funded access.
entries.value: Sekolah boleh menguji mod tetamu awam dahulu, kemudian menggunakan halaman sekolah untuk meneroka aliran kerja tersuai, perancangan kerahsiaan, pilihan sejajar NCERT, dan akses yang dibiayai.

entries.source: Teachers and leaders can start with Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards before a formal rollout.
entries.value: Guru dan pemimpin boleh bermula dengan Belajar Apa Sahaja, Pengajaran Sokratik, Pembimbing Kerja Rumah, kuiz dan kad imbas sebelum pelaksanaan rasmi.

entries.source: Different jobs need different modes: Socratic questions, homework hints, flashcards, debate, history roleplay, writing critique, and more.
entries.value: Tugasan yang berbeza memerlukan mod yang berbeza: soalan Socratic, petunjuk kerja rumah, kad imbas, debat, main peranan sejarah, kritikan penulisan, dan banyak lagi.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything and /chat/socratic-instruction are open learning pages that anyone can try.
entries.value: Ya. Titik masuk topik awam seperti /chat/learn-anything dan /chat/socratic-instruction ialah halaman pembelajaran terbuka yang boleh dicuba oleh sesiapa sahaja.

entries.source: The platform worked on curriculum ingestion, retrieval, structured learning flows, and early AI tutoring experiences.
entries.value: Platform ini mengusahakan penyerapan kurikulum, dapatan semula, aliran pembelajaran berstruktur, dan pengalaman awal tutor AI.

entries.source: More than 100 guides, prompt loops, and pillar clusters for AI-assisted learning.

entries.source: Founded
entries.value: Diasaskan

entries.source: The platform is designed to help people reason, practise, remember, and explain ideas back instead of collecting finished answers.
entries.value: Platform ini direka untuk membantu orang menaakul, berlatih, mengingat, dan menerangkan semula idea, bukannya mengumpul jawapan siap.

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is unevenly distributed. inspir uses AI to widen access while keeping the learner active: hints before answers, questions before lectures, and practice after explanation.
entries.value: Bimbingan peribadi sangat berkuasa, tetapi pengedarannya tidak sekata. inspir menggunakan AI untuk meluaskan akses sambil memastikan pelajar kekal aktif: petunjuk sebelum jawapan, soalan sebelum kuliah, dan latihan selepas penerangan.

entries.value: Sekolah dan rakan kongsi

entries.source: A learner base that already extends beyond India into a wider international audience.

entries.source: inspir began in 2013 as a public quiz and learning community, grew through schools and student networks, and later developed AI learning infrastructure and public AI tutoring experiences.

entries.source: inspir exists to make learning accessible, engaging, enjoyable, and useful for anyone with curiosity, whether they are a student, parent, teacher, or self-taught learner.
entries.value: inspir wujud untuk menjadikan pembelajaran mudah diakses, menarik, menyeronokkan, dan berguna untuk sesiapa sahaja yang ingin tahu, sama ada mereka pelajar, ibu bapa, guru, atau pelajar kendiri.
